series_metadata.series_description: Series includes all Offer, Contract and Amendment documents related to Master Service Agreements. Series supports procurement of telecommunication products and services by the Enterprise Information Technology Contracting staff. Paper records stored on-site or warehoused. Machine readable stored in contract management database. ORC 2305 applies to these records.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: "For sale of goods, retain five years after termination of the contract then destroy. For services, retain nine years after termination of the contract, then destroy. " ; Paper: "For sale of goods, retain five years after termination of the contract then destroy. For services, retain nine years after termination of the contract, then destroy. ", Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Shred
